welcome.title: BoardGameApp
welcome.description: Add games, invite friends and let the algorithm optimally assign players to tables based on their preferences.
welcome.gamesDesc: Manage your board game collection with player count information.
welcome.friendsDesc: Add friends and save their game preferences.
welcome.meetingsDesc: The algorithm will optimally assign players to tables.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
auth.name: Name
auth.forgotPasswordText: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link.
auth.confirmPasswordText: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
auth.verifyEmailText: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
auth.verifyEmailSent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
profile.title: Profile
profile.infoDesc: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profile.resendVerification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.updatePasswordDesc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
games.title: Games
games.empty: You don't have any games yet. Add your first one!
games.name: Name
games.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
games.bggUrlHint: Paste a full BGG board game page URL
games.bggFound: Game found — review the details below
games.bggStep4: Copy the URL from your browser — it looks like:
games.bggGenericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
games.duplicateMessage: A game with the same name already exists. Would you like to add another copy?
games.decrementMessage: How many copies of "{name}" do you want to remove?
games.decrementWillDelete: This will delete the game entirely.
games.playersFilterLabel: Search games by number of players

friends.empty: You don't have any friends yet. Add your first one!
friends.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
friends.duplicateEmailMessage: A friend with email {email} already exists.

sessions.empty: You don't have any sessions yet. Create your first one!
sessions.name: Name
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
sessions.noFriends: No friends available. Add friends first.
sessions.noGames: No games available. Add games first.
sessions.allowUnknownPreference: Treat friends with no recorded preference for a game as neutral (5.5)
sessions.unseatedDesc: These friends could not be assigned to any table.
sessions.noArrangementFriends: Add friends to this session to arrange seating.
sessions.noArrangementGames: Add games to this session to arrange seating.
sessions.duplicateMessage: A session named "{name}" on {date} already exists.
preferences.title: Preferences — {name}
preferences.noGames: No games available. Add games to your collection first.
preferences.hint: Click a rating to rate games from 1 to 10. Click again to remove the rating.

common.cancelMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
